summary: Iteration 34 testing complete: ZETA Auto-Write (Oto Yaz) feature and Plan Downgrade FastSelect enforcement verified. Backend 13/13 tests passed. Frontend all UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/zeta/auto-write endpoint correctly implemented at line 991 in server.py
Auto-write accepts prompt, page_count (1-10), writing_style parameters
Auto-write returns {success, content, pages[], lines, credits_spent, credits_remaining}
Auto-write returns error with credits info when insufficient credits
Credit calculation: 10 credits per 3 lines, minimum 10 credits
6 writing styles available: profesyonel, akademik, yaratici, resmi, gunluk, hikaye
Frontend RightPanel has 3 tabs: ZETA (data-testid=ai-tab-zeta), Oto Yaz (data-testid=ai-tab-auto), Judge (data-testid=ai-tab-judge)
Oto Yaz panel shows: prompt textarea, page count selector (1-10), writing style selector, estimated cost, Yazmaya Basla button
Yazmaya Basla button correctly disabled when prompt empty, enabled when prompt entered
Estimated cost displayed as '~30 satir = ~100 kredi (3 satir = 10 kredi)' for 1 page
FastSelect enforcement useEffect implemented in Dashboard.js lines 98-105
FAST_SELECT_LIMITS in frontend: free=3, plus=5, pro=8, ultra=8
Backend PLAN_LIMITS fastselect_limit: free=3, paid plans=999 (unlimited)
onAutoWriteContent handler in Editor.js adds generated content to canvas
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 tested ZETA Auto-Write feature. User test2@test.com is on Plus plan with ~70 credits. Auto-write endpoint at POST /api/zeta/auto-write. Credit cost: 10 per 3 lines (~100 for 1 page). Frontend test IDs: ai-tab-zeta, ai-tab-auto, ai-tab-judge, auto-write-prompt, auto-write-pages, auto-write-style, auto-write-start-btn. FastSelect limits enforced by useEffect when userSubscription changes - trims tools to plan limit.
